title: Orange Town Under Buggy’s Shadow
description: On pages 3–6, the Orange Town conflict focuses on Mayor Boodle, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, with Buggy’s occupation testing Luffy, Zoro, Nami, and the townspeople.
scene: This part follows the pressure inside Orange Town as Buggy’s crew, the Straw Hats, and the people caught between them react to the escalating fight.

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: But where's the mayor?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: (b) the

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: THAT'S RIGHT...! MAYOR BOODLE WENT TO FEED CHOUCHOU.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What's chouchou doing here without him?

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: You don't think something happened to the Mayor?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This isn't good...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'll go find him!

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: Now don't go off half-cooked! The mayor's too clever to let himself get captured.

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: He knows this town better than anyone.

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: BUT HE ALSO CARES ABOUT THE TOWN MORE THAN ANYONE. MAYBE TOO MUCH.

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: Don't take any unnecessary risks now, Mayor.

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: What matters is that we're all safe. As long as we all survive, we can rebuild this town.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: know, I know. I'm just going to feed chouchou!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WARNED HIM NOT TO TAKE ANY RISKS. I JUST HOPE HEAD ME.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Sorry I yelled at you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: THAT'S OKAY. I KNOW YOU LOST SOMEONE TO PIRATES.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: UNDER- STAND...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: NOT THAT I WANT TO HEAR THE DETAILS OR ANY- THING...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: UNGRPRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRR

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Can't stands it no more!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Huh!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I can't stand any more of their cruel bullying! Not after the way chouchou and this kid fought back so bravely!

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: WHAT KIND OF MAYOR STANDS BACK AND WATCHES HIS TOWN BE DESTROYED!?

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: MAYOR, PLEASE! CALM DOWN!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Sometimes, a man's gotta do what a man's gotta do!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Isn't that right, sonny?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's right!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You said it, old man!!

summary: The scene keeps the Orange Town arc moving by tying the immediate battle to the town’s fear, Nami’s motives, and Luffy’s instinct to answer cruelty directly.
